title: Rebase Conflict Across Multiple Commits
description: You need to rebase `feat/redesign` onto the latest `main`, but `main` has moved forward significantly and your rebase will conflict on three separate commits. You must resolve each conflict in sequence and complete the rebase without aborting.
objective: The branch `feat/redesign` must be rebased onto the current `main`. All three feature commits must be present on `feat/redesign` with conflicts resolved. The final state of `ui.js` must contain both the redesign changes and the main branch updates. The working tree must be clean.
hints: When a rebase conflict occurs on a commit, resolve the conflict in the file, `git add` it, then `git rebase --continue` to move to the next commit.
`git rebase --abort` undoes the entire rebase if you need to start over.
Check `git status` at each step — it tells you which file is conflicted and how many commits remain.
